hero.title: Infrastructure-grade software for operational environments.
hero.subtitle: We build systems for organizations where failure has consequences.
hero.body: Custom development, automation engineering, AI workflow integration, and security hardening for regulated and mission-critical operations.

engagement.title: Request an Architecture Review.
engagement.p1: This is a qualification gate — not a generic contact form. We’ll review your context, identify risk areas, and reply with a recommended next step.
engagement.p2: Expected response window: 24–48 hours. If your request is time-sensitive, specify it in the submission.

form.orgPlaceholder: e.g., Municipality / Public authority / Private enterprise
form.emailHint: Personal email is accepted (soft filter), but organizational email gets prioritized.
form.needOrgEmail: Provide an organization and a valid email to continue.
form.summaryPlaceholder: What environment is this for? Current stack? Constraints? Risks? What does success look like?
form.summaryHint: We respond faster to concrete constraints, scope, and risk signals.
form.receivedBody: Your request is in the queue. If additional details are required, we’ll reply to your email.
form.completeForm: Please complete the form. Summary must be at least {min} characters.
